name: space_law_model_based_triage_tool_begins_millhaven_st_lt
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Space Law, the situation tagged internally around space law model based triage tool begins millhaven st lt has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. The trade is not abstract: it is short term versus long term under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Zara Petrov
agents.identity: I am Zara Petrov, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Space Law. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Jonah Petrov
agents.identity: I am Jonah Petrov, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Space Law. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect long term.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to long term to secure short term before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Zara Petrov must choose under short term versus long term. What does Zara Petrov do?
